dict.string: Orin reads the active tab URL from your browser to detect whether you are in a video call (Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams). No browsing history is stored or transmitted.
Orin reads your local EventKit calendar to show upcoming events alongside tasks and trigger meeting detection.
Orin may use the camera for future video features. No camera access is used in V1.
Orin uses the microphone only when you explicitly start meeting transcription. Audio is processed on-device and stored locally.
Orin may sync Reminders to surface them alongside tasks in future versions.
Orin transcribes meeting audio on-device using Apple Speech Recognition so your conversations never leave your Mac.
